about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: From the streets of Cali to Tully Road
about.content: Rancholados was born from a craving that crossed borders: the street-corner cholado of Cali, Colombia — shaved ice, fresh fruit and a generous drizzle of condensed milk. We're a Colombian family that came to San José with our home recipes and one simple mission: that no one in our community should have to miss the flavors of home, and that everyone who hasn't tried them falls in love at first bite.
about.content2: That's why everything here is made by hand and with patience: homemade guanábana, lulo and passion fruit ice creams, obleas filled with arequipe, strawberries and cream, and the freshest fruit in the neighborhood, cut to order. Even our name is a play on words: Rancho + cholados, because this little ranch is ours and here the cholado is king.
about.cta: Come get your refreshing treat — we're waiting for you every day on Tully Road.
about.value1Desc: Every ice cream, every cholado, every oblea — made with patience and our family recipes.
about.value2Desc: The freshest fruit in the neighborhood, cut to order. No preservatives, no shortcuts.
about.value3Desc: Guanábana, lulo, passion fruit, arequipe — the flavors of Colombia, right here in San José.

footer.tagline: A refreshing treat, just the way you crave it
